tracks.rawText: 1:44RKT： SESIÓN 1 [J44DZu_rw_U] (1)UploadReggaeton track at 95 BPM in G minor, The arrangement features a classic dembow rhythm driven by a punchy kick and crisp snare, A syncopated, staccato synth lead plays a repetitive melodic hook, The bassline consists of deep, sub-heavy 808 slides that lock with the kick drum, Male vocals are processed with noticeable pitch correction and rhythmic doubling, Percussive elements include woodblock-style hits and metallic rimshots, The track utilizes frequent silence gaps and sudden stops for rhythmic emphasis, A high-pitched, filtered synth pad provides harmonic texture in the background during transitions, Record scratch effects and vocal chops are used as transitional fills2PublishRemix
tracks.title: RKT： SESIÓN 1 [J44DZu_rw_U] (1)

tracks.rawText: 0:28[Rec] Apr 26 09_50_12UploadLatin Trap and Reggaeton, A deep, resonant 808 bassline follows a syncopated kick pattern, The percussion features crisp, high-frequency hi-hat rolls and a sharp snare on the third beat of each bar, A dark, minor-key synth melody consists of a repetitive, plucked four-note motif with a short decay, Male vocals are processed with heavy pitch correction and a slight delay effect, The tempo is 90 BPM in the key of G minor, The vocal delivery is rhythmic and melodic, characteristic of the trap-soul subgenrePublishRemix
tracks.title: [Rec] Apr 26 09_50_12

tracks.rawText: 2:46REACTOR GRUESO (1)UploadReggaeton and Perreo track at 95 BPM in G minor, The arrangement features a heavy dembow drum machine pattern with a punchy kick and crisp snare, A distorted, gritty synth bass follows the kick rhythm, High-pitched, staccato synth leads provide melodic accents, Male vocals are aggressive and rhythmic, utilizing a mix of rapping and melodic delivery with heavy compression and short delay, Occasional record scratches and air horn sound effects punctuate transitions, The production is dry with minimal reverb, focusing on a tight, club-oriented soundPublishRemix
tracks.title: REACTOR GRUESO (1)

tracks.rawText: 2:45Súbelo Discov4.5-allReggaeton track at 95 BPM in G minor, The arrangement features a heavy dembow drum machine pattern with a prominent kick and crisp snare, A syncopated, plucked synth melody provides the primary melodic hook, accompanied by a deep, sub-heavy bassline that follows the kick pattern, Vocal performance consists of rhythmic Spanish rapping and melodic chanting with heavy compression and short plate reverb, Occasional record scratches, air horn samples, and electronic transition sweeps punctuate the arrangement, The track utilizes a minimalist harmonic structure centered on a two-bar minor chord loop1PublishRemix
tracks.title: Súbelo Disco

tracks.rawText: 4:12Ni la Mitadv5.5CoverEpic harmonica-driven Latin rock ballad with a soaring diatonic harmonica lead, distorted electric guitars, driving tom-heavy drums, and dramatic bass runs, Verses stay tense and confrontational with stop-start rhythm accents, while the chorus opens into layered power chords, wide reverb, and doubled harmonica lines for a big, emotional lift1PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 0:07[Rec] Apr 26 09:37:12UploadHard rock with heavy metal influences, Distorted electric guitars play palm-muted chugging riffs and power chords, The bass guitar follows the guitar riffs with a thick, overdriven tone, Drums feature a prominent double-kick pedal pattern, a crisp snare on the backbeat, and frequent crash cymbal accents, A high-pitched male vocal uses a gritty, aggressive delivery with occasional sustained belts, The tempo is 140 BPM in 4/4 time in the key of E minor, The arrangement features a breakdown with syncopated guitar stabs and a fast, technical guitar solo utilizing alternate picking and wah-wah effects1PublishRemix
